---
title: "Contact"
---

## Get in Touch {.section-title}

Darya is available to discuss your project, answer questions about CEPSCI inspection requirements, or provide a quote for ongoing weekly inspections.

```{=html}
<div class="contact-card">
  <h3>Darya Dimintiyanova</h3>
  <p>CEPSCI-Certified Inspector<br>Upstate South Carolina</p>
  <hr>
  <p>
    <strong>Email:</strong><br>
    <a href="mailto:darya.cepsci@gmail.com">darya.cepsci@gmail.com</a>
  </p>
  <p style="color:#666; font-size:0.9rem; margin-top:1rem;">
    Serving Greenville County, Spartanburg County,<br>and surrounding Upstate SC counties
  </p>
</div>
```

---

## What to Include in Your Message {.section-title}

To get the fastest response and an accurate quote, please include:

- **Project location** — county and municipality
- **Site acreage** — total disturbed area
- **Project start date** — when inspection services are needed
- **Project duration** — estimated end date or number of months
- **Permit status** — whether your NPDES permit is already in place

---

## Response Time {.section-title}

Darya typically responds to inquiries within **one business day**. For urgent compliance needs, please indicate that in the subject line of your email.

```{=html}
<div class="page-footer">
  &copy; 2026 Darya Dimintiyanova &mdash; CEPSCI-Certified Inspector &mdash; Upstate South Carolina<br>
  <a href="mailto:darya.cepsci@gmail.com">darya.cepsci@gmail.com</a>
</div>
```
